series.name: Agentes Socráticos
series.description: Una exploración en profundidad de cómo aplicar el método socrático a agentes de IA para SDD.
series.description_en: A deep exploration of applying the Socratic method to AI agents for Spec-Driven Development.

series.name: Tournament: CLI AI
series.description: Análisis comparativo en formato torneo de las herramientas CLI de IA: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI y más.
series.description_en: Tournament-style comparative analysis of AI CLI tools: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and more.

series.name: Tournament: Desktop AI IDEs
series.description: Ronda final del torneo de entornos de desarrollo con IA integrada: Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code + Copilot y alternativas open-source.
series.description_en: Final round of the AI-integrated IDE tournament: Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code + Copilot, and open-source alternatives.

series.name: Memoria Persistente para Agentes
series.description: Todas las arquitecturas y protocolos para dotar de memoria a largo plazo a agentes de IA: Hipocampus, HMEM, PlugMem, MCP, PARA, OpenCode.
series.description_en: All architectures and protocols for giving long-term memory to AI agents: Hipocampus, HMEM, PlugMem, MCP, PARA, OpenCode.

series.name: SDD Frameworks
series.description: Comparativa y análisis de herramientas de Spec-Driven Development: GitHub Spec Kit, OpenSpec, BMAD, Spec Kitty, LeanSpec y el método Grill-me.
series.description_en: Comparison and analysis of Spec-Driven Development tools: GitHub Spec Kit, OpenSpec, BMAD, Spec Kitty, LeanSpec, and the Grill-me method.

series.name: Herramientas IA 2026
series.description: El ecosistema de herramientas de IA que todo desarrollador debería conocer en 2026: modelos, IDEs, agentes y flujos de trabajo.
series.description_en: The AI tool ecosystem every developer should know in 2026: models, IDEs, agents, and workflows.
